items.h: AEW Collision Results 6/6 - Women's Tag Titles On The Line, Hazuki Vs. Persephone
items.p: TayJay survived the 5-minute Tag Team Eliminator Match against Divine Dominion to earn a title match. Hazuki will face Persephone in the Owen Cup tournament.

items.h: Maria Kanellis Offers Health Update, Says She Was 'Downtrodden' After AEW Exit
items.p: Former AEW/ROH star Maria Kanellis provides a health update after tumor diagnosis. She also reflects on her former tenure with the Jacksonville-based promotion.
